description_long: This handbag features a tightly woven exterior with a striking checkerboard pattern in shades of yellow, brown, black, and white. The weave is composed of flat, glossy strips that create a visually dynamic, geometric surface. The bag has a rectangular body with a flap closure that folds over the front, giving it a structured yet flexible appearance. The surface finish is slightly reflective, suggesting a polished or lacquered natural fiber, possibly straw or synthetic material. No visible handles or straps are present, indicating it may be a clutch or pouch style. The overall craftsmanship appears high, with clean edges and a consistent pattern throughout.
description: A rectangular woven handbag with a glossy checkerboard pattern in yellow, brown, black, and white, featuring a flap closure and no visible straps.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the pointed ends of the woven structure.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full checkerboard pattern and the flap closure, highlighting the bag's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same narrow, pointed profile.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the woven pattern and the back of the flap.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; likely a clutch or pouch style with no straps or handles
attribute_closure_mechanism: flap closure folding over the front; no visible fastener, possibly magnetic or simple tuck-in
attribute_pattern: checkerboard geometric pattern in yellow, brown, black, and white
